patch.value:
Bug class #4 (wrong exit code). Failure paths returned { error } -> host exit 0.
Repro (before fix):
  pm todos import /tmp/nope.md ; echo $? -> 0
  pm todos import ; echo $?              -> 0
Expected: non-zero.
Fix: throw on no-arg and read failure in import handler; also throw on list-all failure in export handler. Verified missing-file/no-arg exit 1; export-to-stdout still exit 0. (File with zero checkboxes stays lenient: exit 0.)
todos import/export return error object instead of throwing (exit 0 on failure)

author: codex

patch.value: throw in import (no-arg/read-fail) and export (list-all fail). Verified exit 1 for missing-file/no-arg; export-stdout exit 0.

message: throw in import (no-arg/read-fail) and export (list-all fail). Verified exit 1 for missing-file/no-arg; export-stdout exit 0.
